articles.description: The first open sale of tickets for the 2026 World Cup showed Fifa is charging up to  $10,990 (£8,333) to be at the final.
articles.title: World Cup tickets: $11,000 tickets put on sale for final

articles.description: Follow live text commentary and score updates as Barcelona host Real Madrid before Lyon take on Wolfsburg in the final ties of the Women's Champions League quarter-finals.
articles.title: UEFA Women's Champions League Quarter-Finals LIVE: Barcelona vs Real Madrid followed by Lyon vs Wolfsburg

articles.description: Gabriele Gravina resigns as the head of the Italian Football Federation following the national side's failure to to qualify for a third consecutive World Cup.
articles.title: Italy 2026 World Cup: Gabriele Gravina resigns as head of the Italian Football Federation

articles.description: Spanish cyclist Jaume Guardeno is in intensive care after suffering "serious injuries" in a collision with a vehicle.
articles.title: Jaume Guardeno: Spanish cyclist in intensive care after collision with vehicle

articles.description: The Premier League's KMI Panel says both referee and VAR were right not to give a penalty to Manchester United's Amad Diallo at Bournemouth.
articles.title: Bournemouth v Man Utd: Referee and VAR correct on Amad Diallo penalty claim - panel

articles.description: NFL teams splashed out billions in free agency, but what were the biggest moves and who were the biggest spenders? BBC Sport takes a look.
articles.title: NFL free agency 2026: What were the biggest deals & biggest spending teams?

articles.description: Alpine condemn the social media abuse targeted at Franco Colapinto and deny the "unfounded" suggestions they are favouring team-mate Pierre Gasly.
articles.title: Franco Colapinto: Alpine condemn social media abuse and deny favouring team-mate Pierre Gasly

articles.description: Tiger Woods turns down the role of United States Ryder Cup captain next year in Ireland, the PGA of America announces, as he steps away from golf following last week's car crash.
articles.title: Tiger Woods turns down US Ryder Cup captaincy in 2027, PGA of America says

articles.description: British record signing Alexander Isak will return to Liverpool training on Thursday, head coach Arne Slot confirms.
articles.title: Alexander Isak: Liverpool striker to return to team training on Thursday

articles.description: Ten years after playing for Accrington, Anthony Barry is hoping to help Thomas Tuchel win the World Cup for England.
articles.title: Anthony Barry: The English coach helping Thomas Tuchel
